prediction.reasoning: Based on typical stock volatility patterns for large-cap insurance/professional services companies like AON, I estimated a 7-day forecast using historical volatility assumptions. AON typically exhibits moderate volatility with daily moves averaging 1-2%. The point estimate assumes slight upward momentum. Confidence intervals are constructed assuming approximately normal distribution of returns with standard deviation of about 2% daily, scaled to 7 days. Wider intervals reflect increasing uncertainty over longer time horizons.
